channel.title: ros2 on Artoo.ai
channel.description: Recent content in ros2 on Artoo.ai

item.title: ROS1 Bridge
item.description: Installation Install ROS and ROS2. Ensure both are installed on the machine. http://wiki.ros.org/melodic/Installation/Ubuntu https://github.com/ros2/ros1_bridge/blob/master/README.md#example-1a-ros-1-talker-and-ros-2-listener Run Bridge Source the ROS1 then the ROS2 workspaces. Make sure you do it in this order. At the very least, source the ROS workspace. Then set the master URI for ROS. Then start the bridge . /opt/ros/melodic/setup.bash export ROS_MASTER_URI=http://10.42.0.1:11311 ros2 run ros1_bridge dynamic_bridge View ROS Topics as a test export ROS_MASTER_URI=http://10.42.0.1:11311 rostopic list rosnode list rosmsg list Get the ROS Topic Message Types ros2 topic list rostopic list rostopic type /camera/person/detection_image | rosmsg show
